sourceSummary: This public viewer uses a normalized Endian Engine visualization dataset prepared from public evaluated nuclear-data sources.

primarySources.name: JENDL-5
primarySources.fullName: Japanese Evaluated Nuclear Data Library version 5
primarySources.organization: Japan Atomic Energy Agency / Nuclear Data Center
primarySources.formalCitation: O. Iwamoto et al., Japanese evaluated nuclear data library version 5: JENDL-5, Journal of Nuclear Science and Technology, 2023. DOI: 10.1080/00223131.2022.2141903
primarySources.role: Primary evaluated nuclear-data source used during the source-data preparation process.

primarySources.name: Additional source
primarySources.role: Second source used during early preparation; exact public citation to be confirmed before final release if possible.

normalizationNote: The displayed dataset has been normalized, transformed, simplified, and visually encoded for public interactive visualization. Some values may be rounded, categorized, corrected, or omitted compared with the original evaluated files.
authorityNote: Use official evaluated nuclear-data libraries and primary references for authoritative technical, regulatory, medical, reactor, dosimetry, or safety-critical work.
accessNote: The public viewer loads data from external JSON files. The nuclide dataset is not embedded as a giant inline HTML database.
correctionNote: Curated corrections can be tracked separately in data/curated/nuclide_corrections.csv and regenerated into public JSON assets.
